mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE checkup_id = #{checkupId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY checkup_year DESC, created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE (employee_email = #{employeeEmail} OR employee_id = #{employeeEmail}) AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY checkup_date DESC, checkup_year DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE checkup_year = #{checkupYear} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE checkup_year = #{checkupYear} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE checkup_status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE checkup_status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE checkup_year = #{checkupYear} AND is_target = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE checkup_year = #{checkupYear} AND is_target = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE employee_name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE employee_name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%' AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_health_checkup WHERE checkup_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_health_checkup ( checkup_id, employee_id, employee_name, employee_dept, employee_email, checkup_year, checkup_type, is_target, checkup_status, checkup_date, hospital, overall_result, next_checkup_date, notes, author_name, author_email, author_dept, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{checkupId}, #{employeeId}, #{employeeName}, #{employeeDept}, #{employeeEmail}, #{checkupYear}, #{checkupType}, #{isTarget}, #{checkupStatus}, #{checkupDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{hospital}, #{overallResult}, #{nextCheckupDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{notes}, #{authorName}, #{authorEmail}, #{authorDept}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_health_checkup SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, employee_name = #{employeeName}, employee_dept = #{employeeDept}, employee_email = #{employeeEmail}, checkup_year = #{checkupYear}, checkup_type = #{checkupType}, is_target = #{isTarget}, checkup_status = #{checkupStatus}, checkup_date = #{checkupDate,jdbcType=DATE}, hospital = #{hospital}, overall_result = #{overallResult}, next_checkup_date = #{nextCheckupDate,jdbcType=DATE}, notes = #{notes}, author_name = #{authorName}, author_email = #{authorEmail}, author_dept = #{authorDept}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_health_checkup SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
